stemHtml: To avoid maintaining a listening watch when using HF radio frequencies a selective calling system (SELCAL) is used. The SELCAL code letters for Globe Air 621 are 'ALBM'. What is the correct phraseology for requesting a SELCAL check?

options.a: Gander radio, Globe Air 621, request to confirm the correct tone.
options.b: Globe Air 621 request SELCAL check from Gander radio, ALBM.
options.c: Gander radio, Globe Air 621 request SELCAL check.
options.d: Globe Air 621 on 8891, request SELCAL check ALBM.
